_note: T170a (commit 25, OOS-005): outcome remains `pending` because the Cursor CLI smoke fixture has never executed in CI. Per the canonical fix plan and `cursor-fixture-decision.contract.md:34-50`, v1.0 ships in the conservative fail-safe posture: `.cursor-plugin/plugin.json::agents` is ABSENT, `generate_cursor_agent()` raises NotImplementedError, release notes use neutral 'pending' language. The first post-tag `workflow_dispatch` smoke run will flip this JSON to either `passed` (triggering T171 — generate 12 specialists) or `failed` (no scope change needed since we are already in the fail-safe shape). This is the documented v1.0 decision.
